carpet.rule.safeScaffoldingBreak.name: 脚手架防误触
carpet.rule.safeScaffoldingBreak.desc: Require holding scaffolding or an empty main hand to break scaffolding.
carpet.rule.crafterStopsWhenOutputBlocke: 合成器输出阻塞时停止合成
Prevent the crafter from crafting when its output points to a valid auto-accepting container that cannot fully accept the crafted result and recipe remainders.
message.carpet-ice-addition.safe_scaffol: Hold scaffolding or empty your main hand to break scaffolding.
